gaps.description: The MSP Rules section is empty. The bootstrap seed contains no objectives, invariants, constraints, or safety rules. Nomos cannot evaluate Action Proposals against any operational constitution, and all organ actions are unconstrained beyond the Arbiter’s BoR perimeter (which is itself a scaffold). The DIO has remained in default-permissive MSP evaluation since 2026-04-10, with no substantive rules published by the Senate.

The Bill of Rights is a scaffold awaiting human authorship. The MSP’s primary function is to translate the BoR into machine-actionable rules, but the BoR contains only placeholder articles. Consequently, the MSP cannot fulfill its translation role, and any MSP rules drafted by the Senate would lack constitutional foundation. This blocks the entire governance pipeline from reaching a state where Nomos can enforce a human-authorized scope.
